calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Certain Real Property Is Held In Trust
Off Calendar Mar-12-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Roberts for and with Alissa Ozols (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding the court's authority to rule on the 2019 deed, but not the 2021 deed. The court will modify/delete paragraph three in the proposed order. The Petition to Confirm Certain Real Property is Held in Trust is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
